case_title: ENVER KONEYA VS. SEAN S WELLS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONEYA, ENVER AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SEAN S AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT AS TO ASSIGNEE: LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONEYA, ENVER AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, SEAN S AN INDIVIDUAL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
